benchmark_panel.label: Crypto Trading Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Crypto strategy evaluation, execution discipline, and market-adaptive trading workflows.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing mature benchmark chip with clear strategy loops and durable market signal.

benchmark_panel.label: Startup YC Intelligence
benchmark_panel.description: Founder decision support around startup formation, validation, growth, and fundraising.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Existing benchmark chip for startup specialization and repeated founder workflow mastery.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Coding Workflow
benchmark_panel.description: Prompt-to-code workflow acceleration, codebase navigation, and developer throughput improvement.
benchmark_panel.rationale: Strong developer workflow benchmark with clear tooling demand and visible ecosystem pull.

benchmark_panel.label: MCP Server Development
benchmark_panel.description: MCP server scaffolding, packaging, testing, and integration workflows for developers.
benchmark_panel.rationale: High-fit benchmark for protocol-native developer tooling in the current ecosystem.

benchmark_panel.label: AI Agent Architecture
benchmark_panel.description: Agent patterns, tool selection, prompt engineering, evaluation frameworks.
benchmark_panel.rationale: AI agents are #1 category on Product Hunt 2026. MCP has 10,000+ servers.

discovered_opportunities.label: Hook Angle Test Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Generates, tracks, and learns from repeated short-form hook variants so creators can systematically improve opening retention in their niche.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Recent creator-growth writing increasingly treats the first seconds of short-form content as an explicit testing surface. MRPOPULAR reports repeated hook testing as a core workflow, and Hook Studio argues completion-rate optimization has become the deciding growth loop rather than generic vanity metrics.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: testing and iterating opening hooks for short-form creator content across X, TikTok, Reels, and Shorts
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which curiosity gaps, claims, structures, and pacing patterns actually raise completion and hold rates for a creator's specific audience
candidate_context.user_value_loop: draft hook variants, attach them to content drafts, compare early retention and completion outcomes, and update the creator's winning hook library after each post batch

discovered_opportunities.label: Cross-Platform Clip Calendar Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Turns one long-form creator asset into a scheduled, cross-platform clip and post calendar that keeps learning which formats and channels actually compound reach.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Creator tooling in 2025 is converging on repurposing as a repeated workflow rather than a one-off editing task. Repurpose.io frames the main problem as turning one long-form asset into many channel-native outputs, while Athenic presents structured automation flows that drip one source asset across multiple platforms over time.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: repurposing long-form creator content into recurring short-form clips, posts, and publishing plans across multiple channels
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which source segments, packaging formats, and platform-specific edits consistently generate reuse and distribution gains for a creator business
candidate_context.user_value_loop: ingest a podcast, video, or thread, cut candidate clips and post variants, distribute them across channels, and refine the repurposing playbook from performance outcomes

discovered_opportunities.label: Creator Membership Flywheel Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Helps creators convert attention into recurring paid-community revenue by packaging offers, launch cadence, member touchpoints, and retention signals into one repeatable operating loop.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Recent creator-economy reporting points toward memberships and community as the stable monetization center of gravity. Circle's 2025 and 2026 reporting emphasizes recurring revenue and owned community as the core creator business model, while IAB's ad-spend growth shows attention is still expanding even as creators look for more durable monetization layers.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: turning creator audience engagement into paid memberships, community offers, and recurring revenue operations
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which offers, launch structures, pricing bands, and retention rituals actually move followers into long-lived paid communities
candidate_context.user_value_loop: analyze audience demand signals, draft the membership offer and launch sequence, ship recurring member value touches, and refine conversion and retention plays after each cycle

discovered_opportunities.label: Thumbnail Package Test Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Builds and tracks repeated title, thumbnail, and opening-package experiments so creators can learn which packaging combinations actually lift click-through and early watch performance.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: YouTube now treats thumbnail A/B testing as a core creator workflow, and creator discussion shows the next operational pain is coordinated title-plus-thumbnail testing rather than ad hoc manual swapping. That makes packaging optimization look like a repeated system, not a single feature.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: testing and iterating video packaging combinations for creator content before and after publish
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which thumbnail-title-opening combinations consistently improve click-through and early watch behavior for a creator's niche and audience
candidate_context.user_value_loop: generate packaging variants, map them to a release, compare test outcomes, and update the creator's packaging playbook after each publish cycle

discovered_opportunities.label: Audience Comment Signal Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Clusters comments and reply patterns into recurring audience personas, objections, and follow-up content opportunities so creators can turn feedback into their next content loop.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: Recent creator-research work treats comments as a rich repeated signal layer rather than a moderation afterthought. Proxona shows creators struggle to interpret audience feedback with current tools, while SimTube frames believable comment generation and audience simulation as useful for refining content before release.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: mining creator comments and replies for repeated audience signals that shape future content and community strategy
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which audience questions, identity signals, objections, and emotional reactions consistently predict the next high-performing content directions
candidate_context.user_value_loop: ingest comments and replies, cluster them into actionable audience signals, draft the next content or community moves, and refine the audience map after each release cycle

discovered_opportunities.label: Creator Brand Deal Fit Copilot
discovered_opportunities.description: Builds recurring brand-fit briefs, pitch angles, and campaign match recommendations so creators can turn inbound attention into higher-conviction sponsorship revenue.
discovered_opportunities.rationale: YouTube's 2025 brand-partnership roadmap and CreatorIQ's 2025-2026 state-of-market report both point to creator content being extended beyond social posts into broader media and commerce programs. The repeated bottleneck is identifying the right partnerships and packaging creators for them in a scalable way.

candidate_context.specialization_surface: matching creator identity, audience, and content format to repeatable brand partnership opportunities
candidate_context.mastery_surface: learning which creator-brand combinations, packaging angles, and campaign structures actually convert into recurring sponsorship and commerce revenue
candidate_context.user_value_loop: analyze the creator's content and audience, generate brand-fit briefs and outreach angles, track deal outcomes, and refine the sponsorship playbook after each partnership cycle

shocks.label: Breakout Tool Launch
shocks.description: A tool goes viral and creates massive awareness for the domain.

shocks.label: Free Open Source Model Drop
shocks.description: Major open source AI model released free, lowers barrier to entry.

shocks.label: Market Crash
shocks.description: Broad market downturn reduces investment appetite.

governance_note: Discovered candidates use conservative inferred priors. Hybrid specs are exploratory_frontier and must not auto-promote benchmark membership, including proposed benchmark members and promotion-review candidates.
